title: Quality control and quality assurance
summary: 9609 A Level — QC vs QA, TQM, and quality standards.

simpleExplanation.title: Getting it right
simpleExplanation.summary: Quality control checks output after production. Quality assurance builds quality into processes to prevent defects.

sections.content: **QC vs QA** (9.2.1) is a core **distinction**. Link defects to **brand damage** in evaluation.
